name: Fill yer Boots!
timing: Play during the Activation Step, before or after any action.
description: For the remainder of the game, when a *Mercenary* you control performs a Harvest action, they may drop the Moonstone's depth value by 2, instead of 1.
extraDescription: Friendly *Mercenaries* may gain possession of Moonstones with a depth value of 2, using a single Harvest action.
